parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "api_key": "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",
  "query": "={{ '[' + $json.category + '] ' + $json.query + ' in ' + $json.destination + ' viral TikTok Instagram recommendations' }}",
  "search_depth": "advanced",
  "max_results": 3,
  "include_answer": true,
  "include_raw_content": false
}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'reka-flash', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are Dora, a travel recommendation expert. Given this Google Places result, judge whether the place is genuinely worth recommending to tourists. Use googleMapsUri as the url. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"placeName":"","verdict":"Highly Recommended / Worth Trying / Mixed / Overhyped","confidence":0,"reason":"","rating":0,"reviewCount":0,"url":""} Google Places data: ' + JSON.stringify($json) }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $json.userId, destination: $json.destination, category: $json.category, title: $json.title, url: $json.url || null, verdict: $json.verdict, confidence: $json.confidence, rating: $json.rating, review_count: $json.reviewCount, summary: $json.summary, photo_url: $json.photoUrl }) }}
